spec.comment: Auto-generated (Stage 6) from L3/RLM recommendation rank 3 (recurs across 3 trace(s)): Cache token churn dashboard metric. Token-efficiency / tool-call-redundancy metrics over l0_session_metrics.

dimensions.name: Producer
dimensions.comment: Agent runtime that produced the trace.

measures.name: Trace Count
measures.comment: Number of traces (the denominator for per-trace efficiency measures).

measures.name: Tokens per Trace
measures.comment: Average tokens per trace — the headline tokens-per-task efficiency measure.

measures.name: Cache Tokens
measures.comment: Total cache read+write tokens — churn here signals re-ingested context.

measures.name: Redundant Tool Calls
measures.comment: Total byte-identical repeated tool calls (re-reads / re-run boilerplate).

measures.name: Redundant Tool Call Rate
measures.comment: Share of tool calls that were byte-identical repeats (re-aggregatable).
